query: List the five 1 km grid cells in Lillestrøm municipality with the highest number of parcels located in quick-clay hazard areas, sorted by parcel count descending.

2.description: retrieve quick-clay hazard areas within Lillestrøm municipality extent

3.description: retrieve parcels within Lillestrøm municipality and intersecting quick-clay hazard areas

4.description: retrieve 1 km grid cells within Lillestrøm municipality extent

7.description: sort grid cells by parcel count descending
